runners.formComment: In the money last time at Murray Bridge (16.59) in a Grade 5, finishing a one length second. Has three wins and two placings from nine starts from the draw. Among the chances on best.

runners.formComment: Hit the ground running last time with a fast early split and never headed, leading throughout to win by one length (16.91) over 300m at this track. In form and expected to run well again.

runners.formComment: Was out of placings last time (16.96) at this track in a Free For All, finishing fifth and beaten 2.5 lengths. Goes well out of this box with a win and three minors. Others rate better this time.
